rulings.Case Title: ALIDO, LYDIA vs. CABRERA, MARIA M. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Reclassify The Case As Unlimited Civil Case
rulings.Rulings: GRANT, NO OPPOSITION FILED. (302/AJR/ju)

rulings.Case Title: CONLEY VS THE ROMAN CATHOLIC ARCHBISHOP
rulings.Rulings: DENY MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. DENY MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION RE INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS AND VIOLATION OF PENAL CODE. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE WHETHER PLAINTIFF WAS SANCTIONED BECAUSE OF HIS COMPLAINT RATHER THAN MANNER OF REPORTING. GRANT AS TO DEFAMATION. COURT FINDS PLAINTIFF TO BE A LIMITED PUBLIC FIGURE. NO TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE MALICE. STANDARD IS CLEAR AND CONVINCING. (302/AJR/PB)

rulings.Case Title: CATHALENE HEFNER VS. ALEXIS WONG
rulings.Rulings: DEMURRER OF DEFENDANT WONG OVERRULED AS TO 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION FRAUD OTHERWISE DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND BECAUSE OTHER CAUSES OF ACTION RELATE ONLY TO CORPORATE DEFENDANTS. (302/AJR/AA)

rulings.Case Title: U S ORGANIZATION VS. EAGLE INTER
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Reconsideration Of Order Denying Pltf U.S. Omen'S Motion For Summary Adjudication To The First Cause Of Action; Appendix Of Foreign Authorities In Support Of
rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION DENIED. FACTUAL SHOWING THAT EXPENSES INCURRED IN PART PERFORMANCE ARE PART OF OPPOSITION. COURT MAY NOT GRANT MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT WHEN THERE ARE FACTUAL ISSUES PRESENTED IN OPPOSING DECLARATION. IRRESPECTIVE OF WHETHER MATTER ARGUED EXPLICITLY BY EITHER PARTY. OFFSET AVAILABLE IF PART PERFORMANCE IRRESPECTIVE OF BENEFIT TO PLAINTIFF. (302/AJR/MD)

rulings.Rulings: ARBITRATION AGREEMENT STAYED PENDING DETERMINATION OF VALIDITY OF AMENDED ARBITRATION AGREEMENT. (302/AJR/AA)

rulings.Case Title: THE HOUSING GROUP V. UNITED NATIONAL INSURANCE COMPANY
rulings.Rulings: GRANT MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. MATCHING AGREEMENT IN 1998 STIPULATION AND ORDER INCORPORATES SCOTTSDALE AGREEMENT WHICH INCLUDES AGREEMENT TO ARBITRATE. CONDUCT BY UNITED NATIONAL CONFIRMS INCORPORATION OF SCOTTDALE AGREEMENT INCLUDING AGREEMENT TO ARBITRATE INTO 1998 STIPULATION RE MATCHING AGREEMENT AND CONDUCT CONSTITUTES ESTOPPEL TO URGE DIFFERENT INTERPRETATION OF STIPULATION. (302/AJR/CW(EX))

rulings.Calendar Matter: Hearing On Second Supplemental Petition For Writ Of Mandate
rulings.Rulings: HEARING REQUIRED RE TIMELINESS OF WRIT, LACK OF RECORD AND SERVICE OF PROCESS. (302/AJR/PB)

rulings.Case Title: HAIGHT & FILLMORE ASSOCIATES LLC VS. STEPHEN MONCRIEFF SAVAGE et al
rulings.Rulings: MOTION TO STRIKE RETALIATORY EVICTION DENIED. COURT CANNOT DETERMINE AS A MATTER OF LAW THAT RENT WAS NOT PAID IN TIMELY MANNER. (302/AJR/RS)

rulings.Case Title: HAIGHT & FILLMORE ASSOCIATES LLC VS. STEPHEN MONCRIEFF SAVAGE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION Notice Of Motin To File Amendment To Complaint For Unlawful Detainer;
rulings.Rulings: MOTION TO FILE PROPOSED AMENDMENT TO COMPLAINT DENIED. FILED PROOF OF SERVICE IS EVIDENCE AND MAY NOT BE AMENDED. MOTION DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO ASSERTING IN PROPOSED AMENDED COMPLAINT THAT PROOF OF SERVICE DOES NOT REFLECT CORRECT FACTS. (302/AJR/RS)
